name: Pears Helene
recipeIngredient: 3 medium Pears, pared and cut into halves
recipeInstructions:
1. Substitute: 6 can Pear halves, drained for the sugar, water, and fresh ingredients.
2. Refrigerate until chilled.
3. Heat sugar and water to boiling in a 10-inch skillet; reduce heat.
4. Stir in vanilla.
5. Place pears, cut sides down, in skillet. Cover and simmer about 15 minutes or until pears are tender.
6. Turn pears over.
7. Refrigerate in syrup at least 2 hours or until chilled.
8. Just before serving, prepare Hot Fudge Sauce.
9. Place 1 scoop ice cream in each of 6 dessert dishes.
10. Top with pear half and 1 tablespoon Hot Fudge Sauce.
6 SERVINGS; 340 CALORIES PER SERVING.
